items.title_en: Vance says 'the ball is in Iran's court' to move peace talks further, as U.S. blockade takes effect

items.title_en: Suspect in attack at Sam Altman's house aimed to kill OpenAI CEO, warned of humanity's extinction from AI

items.desc_zh: 一份文件显示，旧金山警察局官员从嫌疑人那里找到了一份文件，详细说明了他的意图。

items.title_en: Oracle expands Bloom Energy deal days after receiving $400 million stock warrant

items.title_en: Hungary's next PM would pick up if Putin calls and tell him to stop Ukraine war

items.title_en: Some brave traders who made a leveraged bet on chip stocks nearly doubled their return in almost 10 days
items.title_zh: 一些勇敢的交易者对芯片股进行杠杆押注，近 10 天内回报率几乎翻倍
items.desc_en: Chipmakers have surged since the market’s lows on March 30 from the U.S.-Iran war. Those willing to take on major risk saw even bigger returns.
items.desc_zh: 自 3 月 30 日美伊战争造成的市场低点以来，芯片制造商的股价大幅上涨。那些愿意承担重大风险的人看到了更大的回报。

items.title_en: Fed nominee Warsh clears a hurdle to Senate hearing
items.title_zh: 美联储提名人沃什扫清了参议院听证会的障碍
items.desc_en: Kevin Warsh submitted required ethics paperwork to the Senate Monday.
items.desc_zh: 凯文·沃什周一向参议院提交了所需的道德文件。

items.title_en: Oil prices near $100 as U.S. Navy blockades Iran's ports after peace talks fail
items.title_zh: 和谈失败后美国海军封锁伊朗港口，油价逼近100美元
items.desc_en: The blockade took effect Monday at 10 a.m. ET. U.S. Central Command said it will not impede vessels transiting to and from non-Iranian ports.
items.desc_zh: 封锁于东部时间周一上午 10 点生效。美国中央司令部表示，不会阻止船只进出非伊朗港口。

items.title_en: The Iran war is compounding California's energy crunch
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争加剧了加州的能源危机
items.desc_en: While the United States leans into its domestic crude oil production, one state is being left out to dry, California.
items.desc_zh: 虽然美国倾向于国内原油生产，但有一个州却被排除在外，那就是加利福尼亚州。

items.title_en: Investor Joe Terranova says one public stock is a back door way to play the booming fortunes of private Anthropic
items.title_zh: 投资者乔·泰拉诺瓦 (Joe Terranova) 表示，一只公开股票是利用私人 Anthropic 蓬勃发展的财富的后门方式
items.desc_en: Zoom, which has a stake in Anthropic, is a good way to play the red-hot private AI firm, according to Virtus Investment Partners' Joe Terranova.
items.desc_zh: Virtus Investment Partners 的 Joe Terranova 表示，持有 Anthropic 股份的 Zoom 是与这家炙手可热的私人人工智能公司竞争的好方法。

items.title_en: Philippines accuses Chinese fishermen of dumping cyanide in South China Sea
items.title_zh: 菲律宾指责中国渔民向南海倾倒氰化物
items.desc_en: Beijing rejects the allegation as a "farce", while Manila claims the poison was used to kill fish and deprive troops stationed in the area of food.
items.desc_zh: 北京否认这一指控，称其为“闹剧”，而马尼拉则声称这种毒药是用来杀死鱼类并剥夺驻扎在该地区的部队的食物。

items.title_en: Crowds gather ahead of iconic Indian singer's funeral
items.title_zh: 人群聚集在印度标志性歌手的葬礼前
items.desc_en: The singer, who died at the age of 92, will be cremated with full state honours on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 这位享年 92 岁的歌手将于周一以国家荣誉火葬。

items.title_en: Eight to be awarded for bravery in Bondi Junction stabbing
items.title_zh: 八人因在邦迪交界处刺伤事件中表现英勇而获奖
items.desc_en: Six people were killed and ten injured after a man went on a stabbing rampage in an Australian mall.
items.desc_zh: 一名男子在澳大利亚一家购物中心持刀行凶，造成六人死亡、十人受伤。

items.title_en: Congressman Eric Swalwell quits California governor race amid sexual misconduct claims
items.title_zh: 众议员埃里克·斯瓦尔韦尔因性行为不当指控退出加州州长竞选
items.desc_en: Top Democratic allies intensified pressure on him to exit the gubernatorial race.
items.desc_zh: 民主党的高级盟友加大了对他的压力，要求他退出州长竞选。

items.title_en: The Dutch village at risk of being demolished
items.title_zh: 荷兰村庄面临被拆除的危险
items.desc_en: Moerdijk has been earmarked for removal, to make way for a vast electricity substation.
items.desc_zh: 莫尔代克已被指定拆除，为一座大型变电站让路。

items.title_en: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
items.title_zh: 教宗在主要非洲之行中优先考虑世界上发展最快的天主教地区
items.desc_en: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.
items.desc_zh: 一位助手表示，利奥十四世希望世界关注这片对教会未来至关重要的大陆。

items.title_en: Civilians feared killed after reports of air strike on Nigerian market
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚市场空袭报道后，平民担心死亡
items.desc_en: The Nigerian Air Force has not addressed reports it struck a village market while targeting militants.
items.desc_zh: 尼日利亚空军尚未回应有关其针对武装分子袭击乡村市场的报道。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.title_en: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title_en: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
items.desc_en: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.
items.desc_zh: 该项目是承诺英国可能成为人工智能超级大国的一​​揽子技术投资的一部分。

items.title_en: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将终止对旧版 Kindle 的支持，引发用户强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.
items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。

items.title_en: Greece to ban social media for under-15s from next year
items.title_zh: 希腊明年起禁止15岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
items.desc_en: It follows similar moves in other European countries, including France and Spain.
items.desc_zh: 法国和西班牙等其他欧洲国家也采取了类似举措。

items.title_en: Brit says he is not elusive Bitcoin creator named by New York Times
items.title_zh: 英国人表示他并不是《纽约时报》点名的难以捉摸的比特币创造者
items.desc_en: The British computer scientist and entrepreneur has denied being the man who the New York Times identified at Satoshi Nakamoto.
items.desc_zh: 这位英国计算机科学家兼企业家否认自己就是《纽约时报》认定的中本聪。

items.desc_en: The former employee was fired from Meta after being suspected of downloading 30,000 photos, the company said.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，这名前员工因涉嫌下载 30,000 张照片而被 Meta 解雇。
